next_step_text: 6.29.26 KK - Alexa to share the updates with ANA that we put together for McAfee RE: SMS/whatsapp/etc. to showcase our consistent innovation vs SAP. Hoping this action generates a response one way or another on the outcome of the SAP beta ﻿ 6.16.26 KK - no update on the beta or evaluation from gaurav 6.8.26 KK - FU w guarav on where the beta sits and if they are exploring additional vendors outsid

our_open_deliverables.text: Deliver the updated commercial/pricing proposal to Allstate

buyer_dependent_items.text: Allocate technology-team resources and confirm dates to run the ANA POC
Revert with leadership's direction on the evaluation and the SAP Ariba beta outcome

competitive_position.summary: SAP Ariba is the single strongest current threat: it is the incumbent and Allstate is running a live Ariba beta/workshop as of 26 May 2026, so the award is gated on that beta plus internal alignment. Zycus is well-regarded ('at par', 'fabulous job') and differentiates on AI velocity (Merlin, ANA autonomous negotiation, agentic intake). Coupa and iValua are named in Competitors__c but dormant with no recent buyer mention. Fieldglass (with Beeline as an alternative) is the incumbent VMS on the adjacent contingent-labour track. Do-nothing / Ariba renewal is a real risk given incumbent inertia and the ~Q1 2027 contract expiry.

competitors.name: SAP Ariba
competitors.quote: they are currently still doing a SAP Ariba workshop/beta program
competitors.source: SF Next_Step__c 26 May 2026; 15 Dec 2025 'confirmed SAP VS Zycus'
competitors.how_we_win: Force a scoped ANA POC and AI-adopter reference calls to prove differentiated AI value the incumbent cannot match before the beta concludes

competitors.name: Do-nothing / Ariba renewal
competitors.quote: there's a challenge of the do nothing as well
competitors.source: Avoma onsite 21 Jan 2026; Ariba expiry ~Q1 2027 per Next_Step__c
competitors.how_we_win: Anchor the decision to the Ariba renewal clock with a mutual close plan and a quantified TCO-vs-renewal case for Casey McDowell

competitors.name: Coupa
competitors.quote: Listed in SF Competitors__c; no recent mention in calls, Next_Step__c or activities
competitors.how_we_win: Monitor; no active bake-off signal, keep Zycus AI differentiation front and centre

competitors.name: iValua
competitors.quote: Listed in SF Competitors__c; no recent mention in calls, Next_Step__c or activities

competitors.name: Fieldglass (incumbent VMS; Beeline as alternative)
competitors.quote: Fieldglass referenced as the incumbent contingent-labour management system with Beeline as an alternative VMS option
competitors.how_we_win: Position iSupplier/VMS as unified within the S2P suite on the adjacent contingent-labour track

champion_strength.source: SF Next_Step__c 21 Jan, 28 Apr, 26 May 2026; email task 22 May 2026
champion_strength.summary: Gaurav actively drives the evaluation (exec-session setup, POC and commercials coordination) but has not converted any major gate in five months and has gone quiet since 22 May. Developing, and at risk while the SAP Ariba beta plays out. His identity is not mapped to a formal contact role, so multi-threading to Mohit Bothra and Casey McDowell is essential.

sources: SF OpportunityContactRole: Casey McDowell (Executive Sponsor), Cheryl Harris (Evaluator)
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: The Economic Buyer is identified but not activated: Casey McDowell (VP, Global Enterprise Procurement) is the SF Executive Sponsor and the named target of every exec-session attempt, with Cheryl Harris (SVP, Procurement) as the senior evaluator above the working team. Setting up the Casey session in Chicago has been the plan since 04 Feb 2026 ('working on setting up executive session with Casey') and was pushed again on 18 Feb ('asking for executive meeting w Casey/cheryl'), but it has never been held. No pricing or commercial conversation has reached Casey; all commercial threads sit with the working champion. Getting Casey (and Cheryl) into a roadmap-and-commitment session is the single highest-leverage EB move, and it belongs to Zycus leadership given his VP seniority.

recommended_moves: Re-engage Gaurav to confirm POC resourcing and the SAP beta outcome.
Open a Zycus-leadership exec session with Casey McDowell on roadmap and commitment.
Agree scoped ANA POC success criteria and dates with the Allstate technology team.
